data.description: Create src/constants.ts to hold arbitrary numeric constants — starting with EXAGGERATION_SCALE (currently 100). Currently 100 is hardcoded in multiple places. This file should be the single source of truth for tunable constants so they can be changed without hunting the codebase. Resolves RP-2.
data.title: Add constants.ts for shared magic numbers

data.body: Review: PASS. All 5 constants present with correct names/values/types. No bare numeric literals remain in main.ts. main.js deleted, main.ts in place. index.html updated. tsc --noEmit clean. MARS_BASE_COLOR tuple spread into Cesium.Color is type-correct. tsconfig strict+skipLibCheck appropriate for Vite/Cesium. Implementation is clean and minimal.

REOPEN: RP-3 was implemented on pre-topography main. After reset to origin/main (topography branch), codebase already has TypeScript (tsconfig.json present, all src/*.ts). RP-3 needs to be redone — only constants.ts extraction is still needed. The 'done' status reflects work on the wrong base.

data.reason: Implemented on wrong base (pre-topography main). Must redo on topography codebase.

provenance.reason: Implemented on wrong base (pre-topography main). Must redo on topography codebase.
